title: Mini Effects
description: Automatically folds status effects view in inventory screen
body:
# Mini Effects

This is a simple mod adds a toggle to show/hide effects view in the inventory screen. The GIF just completely shows what it does. If you are bothered by some everlasting buff mod, it might be what you are looking for.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/411/701/minieffects.gif)

Install [Kiwi](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiwi) to configure it.
